summary: NEXUS AI Social Marketplace v4.0 - Comprehensive testing completed. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend tests passed. The platform successfully implements 10 AI agents (5 core + 5 Manus AI), WebSocket notifications, vendor analytics, and admin automation panel.
passed_tests: 10 AI agents endpoint returns correct data with base/manus types
User registration triggers welcome email queue (MOCKED - Resend API key placeholder)
Notification bell component visible when logged in
Vendor analytics page shows all 6 metrics (Products, Views, Likes, Sales, Revenue, Conversion)
Admin automation panel renders with Manus status, tool discovery, integration cards
Tool discovery API returns scored tools from GitHub search (MOCKED - GitHub token placeholder)
Manus task creation API works (MOCKED - Manus API key placeholder)
CI/CD status endpoint returns repository health (MOCKED)
Homepage displays '10 AI Agents Active' in stats section
Agents page shows all 10 agents with CORE/MANUS categorization
All original marketplace features still work (backward compatibility)
Products, posts, vendors, spotlight endpoints working
Admin endpoints properly protected (require admin role)
Manus/CICD/Tool discovery endpoints require admin role
critical_code_review_comments: All services (Resend, Manus AI, GitHub, GitLab) work in MOCK/DEMO mode without API keys - this is by design
WebSocket connection uses socket.io with path /api/socket.io
Email service logs to console when RESEND_API_KEY is placeholder
Advanced agents system properly initialized with db and base_agent_system
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with prefix 'test_user_' and 'UITest_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEXUS v4.0 fully tested. All 10 AI agents (5 core + 5 Manus) working. Services operate in mock mode without external API keys. WebSocket notifications functional. Vendor analytics dashboard complete. Admin automation panel with Manus status, tool discovery, and integration cards working. All backward compatibility maintained.

mocked_services.Resend Email: Logs to console instead of sending (RESEND_API_KEY=re_demo_key_placeholder)

features_verified.10_ai_agents: ✓ All 10 agents visible with correct types (5 base + 5 manus)
features_verified.websocket_notifications: ✓ Socket.io connection working, notification bell functional
features_verified.vendor_analytics: ✓ Dashboard shows Products, Views, Likes, Sales, Revenue, Conversion
features_verified.admin_automation_panel: ✓ Manus status, tool discovery, integration cards visible
features_verified.email_automation: ✓ Welcome email queued on registration (mock mode)
features_verified.tool_discovery: ✓ API returns scored tools with benefit levels
features_verified.cicd_monitoring: ✓ Repository health and code quality endpoints working
